18.sourceTitle: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm Black
18.evidenceText: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit for Clik Valve - 44mm Black. Utilizes Clik Valves for best-in-class performance; Increased durability, increased air flow, and intuitive connection
18.extractionRationale: The evidence contains one distinct third-party accessory product: Wolf Tooth Tubeless Valve Stem Kit, which is explicitly designed for Clik Valves. No other distinct products are mentioned in the provided source.

37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: Product information Features Size guide Specifications Spare parts Find a dealer.
37.extractionRationale: While the page mentions a 'Spare parts' section, the actual list of replacement/spare part SKUs (valve cores, seals, o-rings, replacement kits) is not provided in the extracted content. The specific product codes and quantities cannot be determined from the available evidence.

45.evidenceText: DT Swiss offers their own "Tubeless valve" in multiple materials (alloy and brass) across various profile heights. No mention of Clik valve adoption found in any sources.
45.extractionRationale: The evidence shows DT Swiss uses proprietary tubeless valves rather than Clik. No sources confirm Clik adoption by any of the six major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval). Therefore, the percentage of major brands that have converted to Clik is 0%.

57.evidenceText: No stock status, availability dates, or restock information found in any of the three BIKE24 product pages
57.extractionRationale: The provided sources contain only product descriptions and feature listings without any stock status indicators, back-in-stock dates, or restock turnaround information needed to calculate B2B restock time
